# Filing Pipeline Reference

> Authority chains, format requirements, and component checklists for all filing tiers.

## 4-Tier Filing Strategy

### Tier 1 — IMMEDIATE (Filed / Filing Now)

| Filing | Vehicle | Authority | Status |
|--------|---------|-----------|--------|
| MSC Superintending Control | Original Action + Mandamus | MCR 7.306; Const art 6 § 4 | Drafting |
| MSC Emergency Application | Emergency Relief | MCR 7.305(F); 7.315(C) | Drafting |
| Emergency Motion to Restore | Motion + Brief | MCR 2.119(F); MCL 722.27a | **FILED 3/25/2026** |

### Tier 2 — 30 Days

| Filing | Vehicle | Authority | Status |
|--------|---------|-----------|--------|
| Judicial Disqualification | Motion under MCR 2.003 | MCR 2.003(C)(1); Canon 2 | Drafting |
| Custody Modification | Motion to Modify | MCL 722.27(1)(c); *Vodvarka* | Pending |
| Contempt / Show Cause | Motion for OSC | MCL 600.1701; MCR 3.606 | Pending |

### Tier 3 — 60 Days

| Filing | Vehicle | Authority | Status |
|--------|---------|-----------|--------|
| COA Brief (366810) | Appellant's Brief | MCR 7.212; 7.204 | Drafting |
| Habeas Corpus | Petition | Const art 1 § 12; MCL 600.4301 | Research |
| PPO Termination | Motion to Terminate | MCL 600.2950(4); MCR 3.706 | Pending |

### Tier 4 — Nuclear

| Filing | Vehicle | Authority | Status |
|--------|---------|-----------|--------|
| Federal § 1983 | Complaint | 42 USC § 1983; 28 USC § 1343 | Drafting |
| JTC Complaint | Formal Complaint | MCR 9.200 et seq | Active |
| Civil Conspiracy | Complaint | Common law; *Advocacy Org v Auto Club* | Research |

---

## Filing Component Checklist

Every motion filing requires ALL of the following:

| # | Component | Authority | Notes |
|---|-----------|-----------|-------|
| 1 | **Motion** | MCR 2.119(A) | State relief sought; concise |
| 2 | **Brief in Support** | MCR 2.119(A)(2) | IRAC structure; ≤ word limit |
| 3 | **Proposed Order** | MCR 2.119(A)(2) | Include caption + signature block |
| 4 | **Verification** (if facts outside record) | MCR 2.114(A) | Sworn under penalty of perjury |
| 5 | **Certificate of Service** | MCR 2.107 | Method + date + parties served |
| 6 | **Exhibit Index** | Local rule | Label + title + Bates range |
| 7 | **Exhibits** (Bates-stamped) | MRE 901 | Sequential PIGORS-NNNNNN |

### Appellate Brief Components (MCR 7.212)

| # | Component | Requirement |
|---|-----------|-------------|
| 1 | Table of Contents | MCR 7.212(C)(1) |
| 2 | Index of Authorities | MCR 7.212(C)(2) |
| 3 | Jurisdictional Statement | MCR 7.212(C)(3) |
| 4 | Statement of Questions | MCR 7.212(C)(4) |
| 5 | Statement of Facts | MCR 7.212(C)(6) — record cites required |
| 6 | Argument | MCR 7.212(C)(7) — standard of review per issue |
| 7 | Relief Requested | MCR 7.212(C)(8) |
| 8 | Signature | MCR 7.212(C)(9) |
| 9 | Proof of Service | MCR 7.212(C)(10) |

### MSC Original Action Components (MCR 7.306)

| # | Component | Requirement |
|---|-----------|-------------|
| 1 | Complaint for Superintending Control | MCR 7.306(B) |
| 2 | Brief in Support | MCR 7.306(B)(2) |
| 3 | Appendix | MCR 7.306(B)(3) — orders under attack |
| 4 | Proof of Service | MCR 7.306(B)(4) |
| 5 | Proposed Order | MCR 7.306(B)(5) |
| 6 | Emergency Application (if applicable) | MCR 7.315(C) |

---

## Format Requirements (MCR 2.113)

| Requirement | Standard |
|-------------|----------|
| Paper size | 8.5 × 11 inches |
| Margins | ≥ 1 inch all sides |
| Font | Times New Roman 12pt (or equivalent) |
| Spacing | Double-spaced (footnotes may be single) |
| Caption | Full case caption on first page |
| Page numbers | Bottom center |
| Word limit (COA brief) | 16,000 words (MCR 7.212(B)) |
| Word limit (MSC application) | 50 pages (MCR 7.305(A)(3)) |

---

## Service Requirements

| Forum | Method | Authority | Timing |
|-------|--------|-----------|--------|
| 14th Circuit | E-filing (MiFile) | MCR 2.107(C)(4) | Same day |
| Court of Appeals | E-filing (TrueFiling) | MCR 7.202(6) | Same day |
| Michigan Supreme Court | E-filing (TrueFiling) | MCR 7.302(A) | Same day |
| Federal (USDC WDMI) | CM/ECF | FRCP 5(b)(2)(E) | Same day |

## Filing Fee Schedule

| Forum | Fee | Waiver |
|-------|-----|--------|
| 14th Circuit — Motion | $20 | Fee waiver available (MCR 2.002) |
| COA — Brief | $0 (after claim of appeal) | N/A |
| MSC — Original Action | $375 | IFP application |
| USDC — § 1983 Complaint | $405 | IFP under 28 USC § 1915 |
| JTC — Complaint | $0 | Free |
